history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, which is to the right and two cells ahead. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, so I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Now I am standing on the cell just below the floor at D6. The goal is at F6, two cells to the right. The cell in front of me is a lava cell, so moving forward is dangerous. I should turn right to face towards the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, with the goal visible at row 05 column C, two cells above and one cell to the left. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell. I will move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
